rows.name: CSL040 Complement Activation Inhibitor
rows.content: A recombinant glycoprotein which inhibits the classical, lectin and alternative Complement pathways for the potential treatment of Transplant-related ischemia-reperfusion injury (IRI) [eg. primary graft dysfunction (PGD) in lung and delayed graft function (DGF) in kidney]

rows.name: CSL787 Nebulised Ig
rows.content: Human plasma-derived immunoglobulin for administration via a nebulizer for the potential prevention of chronic respiratory tract infections and progression of chronic lung disease such as Non-Cystic Fibrosis Bronchiectasis (NCFB).

rows.name: Anumigilimab Anti-G-CSFR mAb (SCD prophylaxis)
rows.content: An anti-G-CSFR recombinant monoclonal antibody for prophylactic use in Sickle Cell Disease to reduce the incidence of vaso-occlusive crises

rows.name: Hemopexin (VOC in SCD)
rows.content: Plasma-derived hemopexin for potential treatment of acute Vascular Occlusive Crisis (VOC) in Sickle Cell Disease (SCD) patients.

rows.name: Vamifeport Ferroportin Inhibitor (HH)
rows.content: Oral Ferroportin Inhibitor (small molecule) for treatment of iron overload in hereditary hemochromatosis

rows.name: VMX-C001 rFX (FXa Inhibitor Bypass)*
rows.content: Recombinant, modified, human coagulation Factor X, insensitive to inhibition by Factor Xa inhibitors, to restore coagulation in patients requiring urgent surgery/procedures while taking FXa inhibitors

rows.name: TS23 Anti-α2AP mAb (sPE)*
rows.content: Anti-α2-antiplasmin monoclonal antibody, which is being developed to dissolve thrombi that cause serious conditions such as submassive pulmonary embolism (sPE) and acute ischemic stroke (AIS).

rows.name: CSL404 Cell-based Pandemic Influenza (H5N8) Vaccine
rows.content: For protection against pandemic influenza A (H5N8) virus strain

rows.name: HIZENTRA® (SCIg) 20% Liquid (SID)
rows.content: Subcutaneous 20% Immune Globulin (SCIg)(Plasma) to treat Secondary Immunodeficiency (SID)

rows.name: HIZENTRA® (SCIg) 20% Liquid (PID Naïve)
rows.content: Subcutaneous 20% Immune Globulin (SCIg)(Plasma) to treat Primary Immunodeficiency (PID) for patients without prior IVIg treatments

rows.name: Horizon 2 Ig Yield
rows.content: Using novel technologies to optimise processes for increased Ig yield

rows.name: KCENTRA® PCC (Surgical Bleeding)
rows.content: Prothrombin complex concentrate (PCC) for the potential use in surgical settings with high risk of major bleeding.

rows.name: Clazakizumab Anti-IL-6 mAb (MACE in ESKD)
rows.content: Clazakizumab (an anti-IL6 antibody) for the prevention of cardiovascular morbidity and mortality in patients with end-stage kidney disease

rows.name: CSL964 Alpha 1 Antitrypsin (Treatment of aGvHD)
rows.content: Treatment of steroid refractory, acute Graft-versus-Host Disease (aGvHD) in high-risk patients receiving an allogenic hematopoietic stem cell transplant (HSCT) using Alpha-1 Antitrypsin (AAT).

rows.name: HIZENTRA® (SCIg) 20% Liquid
rows.content: Subcutaneous 20% Immune Globulin (SCIg)(Plasma) to treat Primary Immunodeficiency (PID), Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy (CIDP), Secondary Immunodeficiency (SID)

rows.name: PRIVIGEN® (IVIg) 10% Liquid
rows.content: Intravenous 10% Immune Globulin (IVIg)(Plasma) for the treatment of Primary Immunodeficiency (PID), Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy (CIDP), Secondary Immunodeficiency (SID), Chronic Immune Thrombocytopenia (ITP)

rows.name: ZEMAIRA®/RESPREEZA® Alpha 1 Antitrypsin (AAT Deficiency)
rows.content: Human Alpha 1 Antitrypsin (AAT) (Plasma) for chronic augmentation and maintenance therapy in adults with A1-PI deficiency and emphysema

rows.name: AFSTYLA® rFVIII (Hem A)
rows.content: Recombinant factor VIII product for the treatment of adults and children with hemophilia A.

rows.name: HEMGENIX® (Hem B)
rows.content: Adeno-associated virus vector-based gene therapy indicated for treatment of adults with Hemophilia B (congenital Factor IX deficiency).

rows.name: IDELVION® rFIX-FP (Hem B)
rows.content: Long-acting recombinant factor IX product for the treatment of hemophilia B.

rows.name: RiaSTAP® Fibrinogen Concentrate (AFD)
rows.content: Lyophilised fibrinogen for treatment of Acquired Fibrinogen Disease (AFD)

rows.name: FILSPARI®(Sparsentan) Dual ETA & AT1 antagonist (IgAN)
rows.content: Oral, non-immunosuppressive, single-molecule, dual endothelin angiotensin receptor antagonist (DEARA) with high selectivity for the ETAR and AT1R for treatment of immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN).

rows.name: KORSUVA®/KAPRUVIA® KOR. agonist (CKD-aP)
rows.content: Difelikefalin - a kappa-opioid receptor (KOR) agonist for treatment of moderate-to-severe pruritus associated with CKD in adult patients on hemodialysis.

rows.name: RAYALDEE® Oral ext. release calcifediol (SHPT)
rows.content: Orally administered, prolonged-release formulation of calcifediol for the treatment of secondary hyperparathyroidism (SHPT) in adults with stage 3 or 4 chronic kidney disease (CKD) and vitamin D insufficiency or deficiency.

rows.name: TAVNEOS® Oral C5a receptor inhibitor (AAV)
rows.content: Orally administered, highly potent and selective inhibitor of C5aR1 (complement C5a receptor 1) for the treatment of anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic auto-antibody-associated vasculitis (ANCA)-associated vasculitis (AAV).

rows.name: VELPHORO® Sucroferric oxyhydroxide (Serum P control in CKD)
rows.content: A non-calcium, iron-based phosphate binder used for the control of serum phosphorus levels in patients with chronic kidney disease (CKD) on hemodialysis or peritoneal dialysis.

rows.name: VELTASSA® Oral potassium binder (HK)
rows.content: A non-absorbed, oral potassium binder for the treatment of hyperkalemia.

rows.name: ANDEMBRY® Anti-FXIIa mAb (HAE)
rows.content: Subcutaneous humanised anti-factor XIIa monoclonal antibody for the treatment of Hereditary Angioedema (HAE).

rows.name: AUDENZ®/CELLDEMIC® Adjuvanted Cell-based Monovalent Influenza A (H5N1) Vaccine
rows.content: For protection against Pandemic Influenza A (H5N1)

rows.name: FLUAD® Trivalent Adjuvanted Egg-based Influenza Vaccine
rows.content: Egg-based vaccine combined with CSL Seqirus' proprietary adjuvant, MF59® (an additive that acts to strengthen the immune response to vaccination) for protection against influenza A (H5N1) - the 'bird-flu' strain.

rows.name: FLUCELVAX® Trivalent Cell-based Influenza Vaccine
rows.content: For protection against seasonal influenza viruses in adults and children 6 months of age and older.

rows.name: FOCLIVIA®/AFLUNOV® Adjuvanted Egg-based Influenza A (H5N1) Vaccine
rows.content: Pre-pandemic, egg-based vaccine combined with CSL Seqirus' proprietary adjuvant, MF59® (an additive that acts to strengthen the immune response to vaccination), for protection against influenza A (H5N1) - the 'bird-flu' strain.

rows.name: KOSTAIVE® sa-mRNA Vaccine (COVID)
rows.content: Novel seasonal COVID-19 booster vaccine using self-amplifying platform offering higher efficacy and longer duration and breadth of protection at lower doses of mRNA.

rows.name: CSL403 (aTIVc) Adjuvanted Cell-based Trivalent Influenza Vaccine
rows.content: Trivalent Seasonal Influenza Vaccine (Adjuvanted; Cell-based). High dose vaccine offering protection against different influenza virus strains.

footnotes: *Co‑development project; partner owned asset with exclusive option rights held by CSL
This pipeline is current as at 26th May 2026
